ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "logging_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was logged */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the specific wearable device used */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geolocation data (latitude, longitude) where the session took place */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., workout, daily activity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "rec_no" INTEGER /* Record number of the activity log */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Reference to the session */,
  "hertz" INTEGER /* Frequency of data collection in Hertz */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of activity being performed */,
  "move_type" TEXT /* Type of movement (e.g., el-ex) */,
  "calories_burned" REAL /* Calories burned during the activity */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Average heart rate during the activity */,
  "activity_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in seconds */,
  "activity_intensity" TEXT /* Intensity level of the activity (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rec_no"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user in kilograms */,
  "fitness_goal" TEXT /* User's fitness goal (e.g., weight loss, muscle gain) */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* User's activity level (e.g., sedentary, active) */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any medical conditions the user has */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Any allergies the user has */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* User's preferred language for the app */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movement_data" (
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the movement data record */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Reference to the session */,
  "dm_roll" REAL /* Roll angle */,
  "dm_pitch" REAL /* Pitch angle */,
  "dm_yaw" REAL /* Yaw angle */,
  "dm_rot_x" REAL /* Rotation around X axis */,
  "dm_rot_y" REAL /* Rotation around Y axis */,
  "dm_rot_z" REAL /* Rotation around Z axis */,
  "dm_speed" REAL /* Speed of movement in meters per second */,
  "dm_distance" REAL /* Distance covered during the movement in meters */,
  "dm_elevation_gain" REAL /* Elevation gain during the movement in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestamp"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movement_data_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "acceleration_data" (
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the acceleration data record */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Reference to the session */,
  "dm_grv_x" REAL /* Gravity component along X axis */,
  "dm_grv_y" REAL /* Gravity component along Y axis */,
  "dm_grv_z" REAL /* Gravity component along Z axis */,
  "dm_u_accel_x" REAL /* Linear acceleration component along X axis */,
  "dm_u_accel_y" REAL /* Linear acceleration component along Y axis */,
  "dm_u_accel_z" REAL /* Linear acceleration component along Z axis */,
  "dm_jerk_x" REAL /* Jerk (rate of change of acceleration) along X axis */,
  "dm_jerk_y" REAL /* Jerk (rate of change of acceleration) along Y axis */,
  "dm_jerk_z" REAL /* Jerk (rate of change of acceleration) along Z axis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestamp"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acceleration_data_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quaternion_data" (
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the quaternion data record */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Reference to the session */,
  "dm_quat_x" REAL /* Quaternion component along X axis */,
  "dm_quat_y" REAL /* Quaternion component along Y axis */,
  "dm_quat_w" REAL /* Quaternion component along W axis */,
  "dm_quat_z" REAL /* Quaternion component along Z axis */,
  "dm_angular_velocity_x" REAL /* Angular velocity along X axis */,
  "dm_angular_velocity_y" REAL /* Angular velocity along Y axis */,
  "dm_angular_velocity_z" REAL /* Angular velocity along Z axis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestamp"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quaternion_data_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the user accessing the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the session being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data (e.g., smartphone, tablet) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Geolocation data (latitude, longitude) where the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)
